feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Embedded Analytics Cloud: Grouping DATE values by MONTH from linked dimensions in charts
entry.content:
Hello SAP community,

I have a question about the capabilities of SAP S/4HANA Embedded Analytics Cloud to group DATE values from two linked data sources (linked dimensions) by MONTH (while also showing unbooked values) in a chart.

So for example, let's say I have the creation dates and EUR values of sales quotations (AG) and a sales orders (TA) in two separate Custom Analytical Queries. 

(I know you can usually get this data from a single CDS view, but for the sake of example, let's say you have two data sources).

 

This would be my sample input data:

And this is the kind of chart that I want to create in with SAP S/4HANA Embedded Analytics Cloud:

This is what I am currently able to create. It is close, but it still lacks the grouping by month:

The creation date dimensions are linked for sales quotation and sales order, and unbooked data is displayed:

 

Unfortunately, when I try to group dates by month/year, I get the error "Failed to fetch data".

 

I guess the grouping can usually be done by changing the hierarchy from "flat presentation" to "year-month-day" and then setting the level to month. 

But something about having linked date dimensions seems to interfere.

Is there a way to make this work?

 

Thanks in advance.

 

Best Regards,

Simon

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud - General Error with Filters
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

We're currently encountering an error when adding Input Controls or Story Filters. During my investigation, I noticed that this issue also occurs with the BestRunJuice_SampleModel, suggesting that it might be a general tenant issue. Does anyone have any insights on this behavior?

 

 

Kind regards,

Ismail

entry.title: I want to connect SAC to my on premise SAP HANA database
entry.content: I want to connect SAC to my on premise SAP HANA database, I have filled all the necessary details but still not connecting it is showing error . Please help if any one knows any solution

entry.title: Error when trying to create a scheduled publication in SAC
entry.content:
Hello,

When I try to create a schedule using the File -> Schedule publication option in story, I am getting the error shown below. This is not happening with all stories. Please suggest.

entry.title: Need help on SAC Parameters for date selection in Data Action
entry.content:
Hi SAC Experts,

Need your help to know how to Create Date "Parameter", where User could select the Year, that would automatically select all the Periods underneath it automatically.

At the moment we created a Parameter however, it does not allow us to select at one go instead one after the other.

Regards,

Sacbiconsultant

entry.title: SAP IAS BP
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have three subaccounts (dev, test, prod) in SAP BTP and want to connect them to SAP IAS/IPS (IAS as proxy and Azure as IdP)

As each customer typically has two IAS tenants (test and prod) and one IPS tenant, I am currently looking for best practices for effectively using IAS tenants.

What is the recommended approach?

  • Should the test IAS tenant be connected to two subaccounts (development and test), and the prod IAS tenant be connected to the production subaccount? Are there any technical restrictions?
  • In which subaccount (dev, test, prod) should IPS be implemented?
  • Or is it preferable to assign each IAS tenant to a single subaccount, resulting in a total of three IAS tenants?

 

I would appreciate any advice

Many Thanks

entry.title: Data Action to swing account values
entry.content:
Hi Experts

I am new to data actions (script and visual) in SAC. I am tasked with a swing calculations. In simple terms, there are overdraft and cash accounts. The calculation needs to look at the overdraft accounts and check if the sum value in those accounts is positive, it needs to be moved to the cash accounts, and if its negative it stays in the overdraft accounts. Can I get some advice on how to begin this calc? The SAC model is a week model (goes down from Year>>>Quarter>>>Month>>>Week.

Example (YTD values that have been rounded to the nearest 1000
OD500 = 1000
OD600 = -42

The calculation needs to move the 1000 in OD500 to account CASH500 and the -42 needs to stay in the OD600.

Thank you in advance, experts.

entry.title: How to Implement Joule with SAC
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I'm looking for help in order to successfully add the new AI Joule to SAC through BTP, I've read the documentation so far for the integration of Joule with SAP Apps, but I didn't find it clear enough.

I appreciate any feedback or help. Thank you in advance.

Regards.

entry.title: SAP B1 Web Client Not Accessing On Mobile Browser
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am facing a problem that is i can not access my SAP B1 web client on mobile phone browser but i can easily access it on my laptop browser. My laptop and my mobile phone are on same network. 

What's the reason behind this issue. Need assistance.

Thanks,
Faraz Maqsud.

entry.title: Number formatting changes when executing SAC Stories in View Mode or via Hyperlink
entry.content:
Problem:

The Number formatting changes when the story is executed in view mode or story is executed via Hyperlink or story is executed from the link shared.

Workaround :

The story works fine when we access directly from the Public folder. We are using Live connection and Backend is SAP HANA. 

Impact :

We have created a Dashboard with all the story Hyperlinks and Business will access the respective Dashboards from the Hyperlink provided. From the Business point of view nothing is working as expected.

Observation :  

The issue started with latest SAC patch upgrade on Aug 17-18th 2024.

Currently we are with this version :

Versions

2024.15.8 (Client)

2024.15.6 (Server)

Build Dates

Wed Aug 28 2024 16:36:34+0000 (Client)

Wed Aug 21 2024 17:52:03+0200 (Server)

Few more Observations from tests conducted :

  1. Number formatting changes for a newly created story as well when used measure based input control.
  2. Number formatting changes even when there is no % calculations involved.
  3. Number formatting changes only with the Cross calculations.
  4. Above issues exists in Optimized design for both Responsive page and Classic page as well.
  5. Only few story have this issue after the SAC Patch upgrade.

SAP Analytics Cloud SAP Analytics Cloud for planning #SACCROSSCALCULATIONS #SACPATCH

entry.title: sap sac bi license
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

I realize that Planning Professional allows you to develop planning application and Planning Standard license allows users to use the planning apps to enter and interact with planning data.  My question is would a user with BI license who will not be doing any planning but only view planning data in stories using planning model?  I want to limit Planning Standard licenses.

Thanks

Abdul

entry.title: Widget color is not displayed when SAC story is executed in view mode or via Hyperlink
entry.content:
Problem:

The Widget color is not displayed when the story is executed in view mode or story is executed via Hyperlink or story is executed from the link shared.

Workaround :

The story works fine when we access directly from the Public folder. We are using Live connection and Backend is SAP HANA. 

Impact :

We have created a Dashboard with all the story Hyperlinks and Business will access the respective Dashboards from the Hyperlink provided. From the Business point of view nothing is working as expected.

Observation :  

The issue started with latest SAC patch upgrade on Aug 17-18th 2024.

Currently we are with this version :

Versions

2024.15.8 (Client)

2024.15.6 (Server)

Build Dates

Wed Aug 28 2024 16:36:34+0000 (Client)

Wed Aug 21 2024 17:52:03+0200 (Server)

Few more Observations  :

  1. Widget color is not displayed for the newly created story as well, we used widget color  to highlight measure based input control.
  2. Above issues exists in Optimized design for both Responsive page and Classic page as well.
  3. Only few story have this issue after the SAC Patch upgrade.

SAP Analytics Cloud SAP Analytics Cloud for planning SAP Analytics Cloud, data modeling #SAP_WIDGET #SAC_PATCH

entry.title: SAC – data model updating a date dimension from a Timestamp to Date
entry.content:
Hello SAC Experts,

When I create a data model in SAC, a date dimensions are setup as a timestamp type, when I update the date such as EFFECTIVE_DATE to a date type,

 

It changes it to a dimension table.

Has anyone encountered this? What did you do to get the date to actual update to a date type?

entry.title: Data description import from different file
entry.content:
Hello!

I'm doing a budget plan in Sap Analytics Cloud. Right now i have a excel file with all my core data, which is sorted with a lot of economic codes (example: 1.1  , 1.0.1 etc), each code has a description (example: 1.0.1 - technology spendings), the descriptions are in a separate excel file, which connects every code with its description.

Is there any way to import the descriptions excel file to my existing model and match the core file codes with the second files description? In a way that i could have a "Description" dimension.

entry.title: Posting a rounding difference
entry.content:
Hi Experts

I have a calculation that is not working and hoping you can help. I have a data action that looks at the Trial balance (has income statement and balance sheet data). I need to round the amounts/values to the nearest thousand. And then post the rounding difference [(Amounts/1000) - Round((Amounts/1000),0), to 3 accounts. 

  • For the income statement rounding difference, it should be posted to IS_ROUND
  • For the Balance sheet rounding difference, it should be posted to either BS_ROUND_DR or BS_ROUND_CR, depending on whether the rounding difference is positive or negative.

The issue is that the rounding difference I see when I run the data action, I get a higher number than expected. Please advise, thanks in advance.

My Data action:
MEMBERSET [d/CBS_PROFIT_CENTER] = (BASEMEMBER([d/CBS_PROFIT_CENTER].[h/TOTAL], %profit_center%))
IF [d/Measures] = "IS_Rounding" AND [d/CBS_ACCOUNTS] = "ROUNDING_IS" AND [d/CBS_Account_Cognos].[p/BIS_Company_Code] = "46212" THEN
DATA([d/CBS_ACCOUNTS] = "ROUNDING_IS", [d/Measures] = "Rounding_Measure", [d/CBS_Account_Cognos] = "IS-ROUNDING46212M-PL20300") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/CBS_ACCOUNTS] = "ROUNDING_IS", [d/Measures] = "IS_Rounding")
ENDIF
IF RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "IS_Rounding", [d/CBS_ACCOUNTS] = "ROUNDING_BS") < 0 THEN
IF [d/CBS_Account_Cognos].[p/BIS_Company_Code] = "46212" THEN
DATA([d/CBS_ACCOUNTS] = "ROUNDING_BS", [d/Measures] = "Rounding_Measure", [d/CBS_Account_Cognos] = "BS-ROUNDING46212M-BS20400") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/CBS_ACCOUNTS] = "ROUNDING_IS", [d/Measures] = "IS_Rounding")
ELSE
DATA([d/CBS_ACCOUNTS] = "ROUNDING_BS", [d/Measures] = "Rounding_Measure", [d/CBS_Account_Cognos] = "BS-ROUNDING46212M-BS10420") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/CBS_ACCOUNTS] = "ROUNDING_IS", [d/Measures] = "IS_Rounding")
ENDIF
ENDIF

entry.title: Unable to drill down TO more than Level 5 in SAC Hierarchy - where BW Hierarchy is Level 10.
entry.content:
When I right click on the Hierarchy it shows only till Level 5, whereas same BW Query level hierarchy shows till Level 10. We are on QRC 1 2024. BW Live connection. IS there any way to show the same as in BW Query. I found SAP release saying, its fixed in SAC. This is a Q4 2022. We are way beyond in SAC QRC1 2024> Why is it not working?

 

BW

entry.title: Can SAP Analytics Cloud send alerts when a KPI reaches a specified limit?
entry.content:
Hello, 
Can SAP Analytics Cloud for Planning send alerts when a KPI/number reaches a specified limit?
If yes, how?
If not, is there a workaround that does not include thresholds (that are not always available, and I don't know why).
Thank you.

Deb

entry.content: How to import and connect two tables in one model in SAP SAC

entry.content: How do I change the rows/columns in the Data Lock area in SAP Analytics Cloud.  In the below example I would like the Date dimension to be in the rows and the Audittrail dimension to be in the columns:

entry.title: shopping cart in MM for SAP Help
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

How are you?

I have some questions about the shopping cart in MM for SAP, I need to know and information about shopping cart and what, where, How? ..... etc, for where is using the shopping cart in SAP and how to use this in any project.

And what is the benefit for shopping cart and what is the circle or workflow for the shopping cart for any project if you have any example?

If there anyone you can explain to me and if you have any website or photo to help me pls shared with me.

Thank you,

#ERP #MM #SAP #material_management #MM #cart #s4hana #sap #help #support #workflow
